form.formComment: Two back was seventh behind Always Bettor at Launceston over 1680m in a 3yo+ NMT 2 LTW's on March 29 at $51. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Stepupndance at this track over 1609m in a NR 43 to 46 on April 3 at $3.60. Can retain the good form.
